allow: Bash(find build/reports/tests -name "*.xml" | xargs grep -l "QuoteControllerTest" 2>/dev/null | head -1 | xargs cat 2>/dev/null | grep -E 'testcase|testsuite' | head -40)
Bash(./gradlew bootRun --args='--debug' 2>&1 | grep -i "Kafka" | grep -i "condition\\|did not match\\|matched\\|negative\\|positive" | head -20)

Bash(find ~/.gradle/caches -name "*.jar" -path "*/springframework.boot/*" 2>/dev/null | xargs -I{} sh -c 'jar tf "{}" 2>/dev/null | grep -il kafka && echo "FILE: {}"' 2>/dev/null | grep -v "^$" | head -20)
Bash(find ~/.gradle/caches -name "*.jar" -path "*/springframework.kafka/*" 2>/dev/null | xargs -I{} jar tf "{}" 2>/dev/null | grep -i "autoconfigur\\|AutoConfigur" | head -20)
Bash(find ~/.gradle/caches -name "*.jar" 2>/dev/null | xargs -I{} sh -c 'jar tf "{}" 2>/dev/null | grep -q -i "KafkaAutoConfiguration" && echo "{}"' 2>/dev/null | head -10)
Bash(lsof -ti :8080 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; sleep 1 && ./gradlew bootRun 2>&1 | grep -E "Started|FAILED|ERROR|KafkaTemplate|port" | head -10)
Bash(lsof -ti :8080 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; ./gradlew bootRun 2>&1 | grep -E "Started quoteEngine|FAILED|APPLICATION FAILED")
Bash(./gradlew bootRun 2>&1 | tee /tmp/bootrun.log | grep -E "Started quoteEngine|APPLICATION FAILED|KafkaTemplate")
Bash(lsof -ti :8080 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; ./gradlew bootRun 2>&1 | grep -E "Started QuoteEngine|APPLICATION FAILED|ERROR" | head -5)
